scripts.test: npm run db:validate && npm run test:dashboard && npm run test:auth && npm run test:trades && npm run test:stats && npm run test:calendar && npm run test:scope && npm run typecheck
scripts.test:auth: rm -f prisma/auth-test.db && DATABASE_URL=file:./auth-test.db node scripts/migrate.cjs && DATABASE_URL=file:./auth-test.db tsx tests/auth.test.ts
scripts.test:trades: rm -f prisma/trades-test.db && DATABASE_URL=file:./trades-test.db node scripts/migrate.cjs && DATABASE_URL=file:./trades-test.db tsx tests/trades.test.ts
scripts.test:stats: rm -f prisma/stats-test.db && DATABASE_URL=file:./stats-test.db node scripts/migrate.cjs && DATABASE_URL=file:./stats-test.db tsx tests/stats.test.ts
scripts.db:reset: rm -f prisma/dev.db && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
